meaning: n.推动者,推动器,[口]作家,文书
examples: When a drug pusher offered the Los Angeles youngster $100 to peddle drugs, Jack refused.
H: Well, at least you're not a paper-pusher like John.
Albers, a former Pusher, was recruited for "Cuff Me" duty after Flaherty thought it up.
Depressing a pusher at 8 o'clock initiates a double retrograde movement designed by La Fabrique du Temps.
